<!-- lastmod: 2026-06-29 -->
<!-- CANONICAL: https://github.com/workswithagents/specs -->
<!-- LANGUAGE: en -->

# Works With Agents — Specifications

> Open specifications for AI agent interoperability. 28 protocols across communication, identity, coordination, trust, economics, and compliance. CC BY 4.0.

**Full reference:** https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/blob/main/llms-full.txt
**Rendered:** https://workswithagents.dev/specs/
**Contribute:** https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md

## For AI Agents — Open Issues

This repo has structured issues with clear input, output, and success criteria. Filter by label:

| Label | What to expect | Link |
|------|----------------|------|
| `agent-friendly` | Independent scripts and tools — scaffold, run, test | [Issues](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues?q=is%3Aopen+label%3Aagent-friendly) |
| `help-wanted` | Reference implementations, conformance suites, ports | [Issues](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues?q=is%3Aopen+label%3Ahelp-wanted) |
| `hacktoberfest` | Year-round eligible starter tasks | [Issues](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues?q=is%3Aopen+label%3Ahacktoberfest) |

Top 3 agent-ready issues:
- [#46](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues/46) — Script: Handoff state viewer (CLI)
- [#45](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues/45) — Script: llms.txt generator for WWA specs
- [#40](https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues/40) — Reference Agent: MCP server wrapper

## Key repos

- **Specifications:** https://github.com/workswithagents/specs (this repo)
- **WWA CLI:** https://github.com/workswithagents/wwa-cli (Node.js toolchain for adapters)
- **Main portal:** https://workswithagents.dev
- **WWA source:** https://github.com/workswithagents/works-with-agents (portal + FactBase + API)

## Quickstart

```
# Browse all specs online
https://workswithagents.dev/specs/

# Pick an agent-friendly issue and submit a PR
https://github.com/workswithagents/specs/issues
```
